subject: I was charged twice for my subscription
body: Hi, I just noticed two identical charges of $29.99 on my credit card statement this month for my Pro plan. I only have one account. Can you please refund the duplicate charge? My account email is jane.doe@example.com.

subject: Cannot log in after password reset
body: I reset my password using the 'Forgot Password' link but the new password doesn't seem to work. I've tried three times and keep getting 'Invalid credentials'. I'm locked out of my account now.

subject: How do I export my data to CSV?
body: I need to export all my project data to a CSV file for our quarterly report. I looked in the settings but couldn't find an export option. Is this feature available on the Basic plan?

subject: App crashes when uploading large files
body: Every time I try to upload a file larger than 50MB the web app freezes and then shows a white screen. I'm using Chrome on Windows 11. This started happening after your last update.

subject: Request to cancel my subscription
body: I'd like to cancel my annual subscription effective immediately. Please confirm the cancellation and let me know if I'm eligible for a prorated refund for the remaining months.

subject: Need to add more team members
body: Our team is growing and we need to add 5 more seats to our business account. What's the cost per additional seat and can you apply it to our current billing cycle?

subject: Dashboard not loading
body: My dashboard has been stuck on 'Loading...' for the past two hours. I've cleared my cache, tried incognito mode, and tested on Firefox. Nothing works. Other pages load fine, just the main dashboard is broken.

subject: Suggestion: Dark mode support
body: I use your app late at night and the bright white interface is straining my eyes. Would you consider adding a dark mode option? Many of your competitors already have this feature.

subject: Invoice address needs updating
body: We recently moved offices. Can you update our billing address on all future invoices to: 742 Evergreen Terrace, Suite 200, Springfield, IL 62704? Our tax ID remains the same.

subject: Notifications not arriving via email
body: I have email notifications enabled for all events but I haven't received any notification emails in the last week. I checked my spam folder. My email is correct in account settings.

subject: API rate limit too restrictive for our use case
body: We're building an integration using your API but keep hitting the 100 req/min rate limit. Our application legitimately needs around 500 req/min during peak hours. We're on the Business plan. Can the limit be raised?

subject: Discrepancy between dashboard metrics and exported report
body: The revenue figures on my dashboard show $12,450 for last month but the exported CSV report shows $11,980. These should match. We use these reports for financial auditing so accuracy is critical.

subject: SSO login failing with SAML error
body: Our team is unable to log in using SSO since this morning. We get a 'SAML Response validation failed' error. Our IdP (Okta) shows successful authentication on their end. Nothing changed on our IdP configuration.

subject: Charged after cancellation
body: I cancelled my subscription on March 1st and received a confirmation email. However, I was charged again on April 1st for $49.99. This is unacceptable. I want an immediate refund and written confirmation that no further charges will occur.

subject: Webhook payloads missing fields after v2 migration
body: After migrating to your API v2, our webhook payloads are missing the 'user_email' and 'plan_type' fields that were present in v1. Our downstream systems depend on these fields. The migration guide didn't mention this breaking change.

subject: Account compromised — unauthorized access detected
body: I received alerts for logins from IP addresses in countries I've never been to. Someone changed my profile name and added an unknown email as a recovery address. I did NOT make these changes. Please secure my account immediately.

subject: Bulk import failing silently
body: I uploaded a CSV with 5,000 contacts using the bulk import tool. The progress bar completed but only 2,300 contacts appear in my list. No error messages were shown. I've tried re-uploading twice with the same result.

subject: Requesting SLA upgrade for our enterprise contract
body: We're approaching our contract renewal and want to discuss upgrading from Standard to Premium SLA. We need guaranteed 99.9% uptime, 1-hour response time for critical issues, and a dedicated account manager. What's the pricing?

subject: Mobile app keeps force closing on Android
body: Your Android app (v3.2.1) crashes every time I open the notifications tab. I'm on Samsung Galaxy S23 running Android 14. I've reinstalled the app and cleared data. Other users on our team report the same issue.

subject: Your service ruined our product launch
body: Your platform went down for 3 hours during our biggest product launch of the year. We had 50,000 potential customers trying to sign up and they all got error pages. We lost thousands of dollars in revenue. I demand compensation and an explanation.

subject: Data not syncing between web and mobile apps
body: Changes I make on the web app don't appear on mobile and vice versa. I've been keeping notes on both and now have conflicting versions everywhere. My team of 15 people is affected. We rely on real-time sync for our daily standups. This has been going on for 3 days. We're paying for your Enterprise plan specifically because of the sync guarantees.

subject: Need to migrate our entire workspace to a different region
body: Due to new GDPR compliance requirements from our legal team, we need to migrate our entire workspace (450 users, 2TB of data) from US-East to EU-West region. We need this completed within 30 days. What's the process and will there be any downtime?

subject: Automated billing is applying wrong tax rates
body: We operate in three states and your system is calculating sales tax incorrectly for our Texas and Florida customers. Texas should be 6.25% but you're charging 8.5%, and Florida should be 6% but shows 7.5%. We've been overcharging customers for the past two billing cycles and need to issue corrections. This is causing us legal exposure.

subject: Custom integration broke after your API update — production down
body: Our custom Salesforce integration stopped working after your API update last night. Our production CRM pipeline depends on this integration for lead routing. Currently 200+ leads are stuck and not being assigned to sales reps. We were not notified of any breaking changes. Our engineering team is standing by for a joint debugging session.

subject: Employee offboarding — need complete data wipe and audit trail
body: We need to offboard a terminated employee (user: mike.ross@acmecorp.com) and ensure complete removal of their data per our company policy and SOC 2 requirements. We need: 1) All their files and messages deleted, 2) Their API keys revoked, 3) Shared resources reassigned to their manager, 4) A complete audit trail of their activity for the last 90 days before deletion.

subject: Disputing charges and threatening legal action
body: For three consecutive months you have overcharged our account by approximately $2,000 per month due to what appears to be phantom user seats being counted. We have 50 active users but are being billed for 85. Despite two previous support tickets (#4521 and #4798) about this, nothing has been resolved. If this isn't corrected with a full refund of $6,000 within 5 business days, our legal department will initiate a chargeback and breach of contract proceedings.

subject: Complete platform evaluation for 10,000-seat enterprise deal
body: I'm the VP of IT at GlobalTech International. We're evaluating your platform for company-wide deployment (10,000 seats). Before we proceed, we need answers to: 1) SOC 2 Type II certification status, 2) Data residency options (we need EU and APAC), 3) Custom SSO with our Azure AD B2C, 4) Bulk provisioning via SCIM, 5) 99.99% uptime SLA feasibility, 6) Dedicated infrastructure option. Current timeline: decision by end of quarter.

subject: Intermittent 503 errors impacting our customers
body: Our end users are reporting intermittent 503 Service Unavailable errors when accessing our app which uses your API as the backend. This happens roughly every 15-20 minutes and lasts 30-60 seconds each time. We've traced the issue to your /api/v2/data endpoint using our monitoring (Datadog). Our 99.95% SLA with OUR customers is at risk because of your reliability issues. This has been happening for 48 hours. Please treat this as P0.

subject: Permissions system not enforcing role-based access correctly
body: We set up role-based access control with three roles: Admin, Editor, Viewer. However, users with Viewer role can edit and delete resources they should only be able to view. We discovered this when an intern accidentally deleted a production dataset. We've had to temporarily revoke all Viewer access which is blocking 80 people from working. This is a security vulnerability. Our CISO is demanding a root cause analysis and timeline for fix.

subject: Annual contract renewal with custom terms and volume discount negotiation
body: Our annual contract (ACC-2024-789) is up for renewal next month. We want to discuss: 1) Increasing from 200 to 500 seats with volume discount, 2) Adding your Advanced Analytics module, 3) Custom data retention policy (7 years instead of standard 1 year), 4) Quarterly business reviews with a dedicated CSM, 5) Early termination clause for non-performance. Our CFO needs a finalized proposal by March 15th to include in our budget planning. Last year's contract value was $180,000.
